prompt: I want to do a headless planning session on the API migration PRD at docs/prds/api-v3-migration.md. Auto-decide on ambiguities, skip the review, just generate the full plan and task breakdown into ohno.

assertions.text: Recognizes headless mode request (auto-decide, no interactive review)
Documents or logs auto-decisions on ambiguities rather than asking
Dispatches yokay-planner agent or follows planner workflow
Skips the interactive plan review session
